title: 80Pcs Self Drilling Drywall Anchors with Screws Kit, 3 Sizes Heavy Duty Dry Wall Anchor Screw Set, No Drill and Holes in Wall, Expansion Fixings for Plaster Board Wall Fixing (40 Anchors + 40 Screws)
features: No Drilling & Easy Installation: With our self-tapping drywall anchors, there’s no need to pre-drill! Simply hammer the expansion plug into the wall to secure the object, then tighten the screw. The ribbed anchor will expand, creating a strong fixing point. Save time and effort—say goodbye to wall damage.

Wide Applications: Available in small, medium, and large sizes, these anchors and screws are widely used for securing various objects on materials like plasterboard, hollow bricks, lightweight bricks, and drywall. They are especially suitable for hanging wall lights, pictures, mirrors, curtain rods, TVs, clocks, shelves, blackboards, and plants.（Tip: This product is not suitable for walls with excessive hardness. If you have any questions, please consult us through the backend.）

Safe and Durable: Made of high-quality carbon steel with a galvanized surface treatment to enhance corrosion resistance, toughness, and impact resistance. Its unique expansion design provides exceptional grip stability for long-lasting use.

3 Size Kit: The storage box includes 30mm*20, 35mm*10, and 40mm*10 screws, as well as 30mm*30 and 40mm*10 anchors. This ensures you have enough accessories to complete multiple projects, eliminating the hassle of frequent purchases.

Heavy Duty Load Capacity: Made from strong materials, these anchors and screws offer excellent load-bearing capacity. Feel confident hanging heavier items while effectively reducing the risk of falling, providing stable support for an extended period.
